profile.personality: A sluggish, irresolute individual who tends toward obesity and physical stagnation, with a deep sensitivity to environmental conditions—easily chilled yet equally distressed by warmth. They are averse to mental exertion and prefer open air, displaying a general heaviness and paralytic weakness that pervades both body and mind.
profile.mental_state: Marked mental dullness and slowness of thought, worst in the morning, with an inability to concentrate on close mental work and a dread of intellectual effort. Memory is paradoxically split—vivid recall of distant youth but forgetfulness of recent events—accompanied by profound irresolution, an inability to make decisions, and restless mental activity in the evening that prevents sleep until midnight.
profile.emotional_pattern: Extreme melancholic depression dominated by thoughts of death and salvation, intensely aggravated by music, with constant mood fluctuations between morning despair and evening excitability. Fretful, impatient, and irritable over trifles, prone to deep anxiety reaching desperation, with grief and vexation triggering recurrence of all mental suffering.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: It is a most useful remedy in hard, swollen, sore liver with weight and distress in the liver
rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard, liver: It is a most useful remedy in hard, swollen, sore liver with weight and distress in the liver; stitches in both hypochondria, burning in left hypochondrium when lying on it; sensitive to clothing in the liver region.
rubric_passages.Back: The spine is very sensitive to the jar of the bed; pain in lumbar region as if "spine were broken"; pain in sacrum with numbness down the limbs; pain in sacrum and coccyx while urinating; itching and moisture over the coccyx.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: pain in lumbar region as if "spine were broken"; pain in sacrum with numbness down the limbs; pain in sacrum and coccyx while urinating
rubric_passages.Bladder: burning in the urinary passages and neck of the bladder when not urinating
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: After urination there is some dribbling; burning in the urinary passages and neck of the bladder when not urinating
rubric_passages.Chest: Constriction of the heart; electric shocks in the heart; palpitation on motion or exertion with strong pulsation all over the body and in the extremities; stitching pains in the chest.
rubric_passages.Chill: Chill in the evening with tearing in the limbs chill intermingled with the fever; wants to be covered in all stages chill worse after eating, better after drinking and in open air. Nightly fevers with chilliness but no sweat; dry beat evening and night, especially before midnight; anxiety and restlessness during the fever, hands and soles very hot; even burning heat.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Drawing and tearing pains in limbs; weakness of all limbs; sensation of paralysis of limbs; herpes and eczema on the limbs; marked numbness of the upper limbs, during rest and when lain on; numbness and coldness of fingers and hands.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: numbness and coldness of fingers and hands. Cold feet in evening in bed
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: numbness and coldness of fingers and hands
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis in any part but especially in the lower limbs; sensation of paralysis or stagnation creeps over the body and limbs.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Extreme weakness. Weakness and desire to lie down. Paralysis in any part but especially in the lower limbs; sensation of paralysis or stagnation creeps over the body and limbs.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: It is a very deep acting remedy, like all carbons, and is accompanied with induration and burning in the base of the ulcers, inflamed tissues and old cicatrices; burning in many parts and especially in old cicatrices
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Extreme weakness. Weakness and desire to lie down. sudden sinking of strength; sudden weakness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the female it causes aversion to coition; enlarged, hard ovaries great tenderness in uterus and ovaries. It has cured ovarian tumor. Pain in the uterus when reaching high with hands; bearing down in uterine region.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the uterus when reaching high with hands; bearing down in uterine region. great tenderness in uterus and ovaries.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are brought on from becoming cold and from looking into a bright light; are worse in a warm room, and better in the open air. There is marked soreness in the scalp; itching of the scalp with or without eruptions; eczema of the scalp oozing a glutinous fluid; eczema behind the ears; fissures that bleed behind the ears; scaly eruptions on scalp; falling out of the hair; bald, shiny patches on the scalp.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental depression is extreme, and it is made worse by music; her sadness is so great that she thinks only of death and salvation. Grief and vexation cause of recurrence of all her distressing mental sufferings. Her moods are constantly changing; while she may recall all the events of youth, recent events are forgotten; slow of thought and weakness of mind worse in the morning
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: extremely fretful and impatient; irritable about trifles and very critical.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Taste in the mouth is bitter, salty, sour and like spoiled eggs; nauseating taste in the morning; sour taste after eating. The tongue is coated white; burning blisters on lower lip and on tip of tongue, painful ulcers on under surface of tongue, putrid odor from gums and mouth; breath smells like urine.
rubric_passages.Rectum: From the anus there is copious discharge of very offensive flatus day and night. Large hemorrhoids extremely sore with fissures.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipation with large, hard, knotty, difficult stools passed with extreme pain from soreness and fissures of the anus. No desire to go to stool for many days. It requires a long time with hard straining to pass the stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Violent pains during stool. extreme soreness of the anus; fissures of the anus; great burning.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Violent burning in the anus. great burning. It has cured many cases of bleeding piles of long standing where there was extreme soreness and fissures and great burning.
rubric_passages.Respiration: He suffocates when falling asleep (like Lachesis) and often wakes up in the night gasping for breath; constriction of the chest.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: He suffocates when falling asleep (like Lachesis) and often wakes up in the night gasping for breath; constriction of the chest. He is driven to eat to relieve a feeling of suffocation and burning gnawing in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Skin: Itching of the skin all over the body, with or without eruptions itching worse at night in the warm bed; itching and burning with eruptions; the skin is very hot at night; excoriation of the skin in the bends of joints. Every injury festers. Fissures on ends of fingers, on nipples, labial commissures at anus and vulva, between the toes.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Dreams vivid; anxious, horrible, vexatious. Sleepless before midnight; sleepiness during the day. Nightly pains in sleep. Frequent waking. Unrefreshed in the morning.
rubric_passages.Sleep, restless: Extreme activity of mind in the evening and first half of the night, which, prevents sleep until midnight; Sleepless before midnight; Frequent waking. Unrefreshed in the morning.

profile.personality: A weak-willed, hypochondriacal individual prone to nervous prostration and mental exhaustion, often associated with coffee or alcohol abuse. They are capricious and irritable, with a marked aversion to work and a tendency toward pride-related complaints.
profile.mental_state: Characterized by lack of willpower, mental depression, and fear of the future. There is significant cerebral congestion with vertigo triggered by multiple stimuli, and the mind is weakened alongside the body in a state of nervous exhaustion.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deeply irritable and emotionally unstable, oscillating between melancholic depression and states of excessive excitability, particularly sexual over-excitement in women. The core emotional theme is a loss of self-governance—the will cannot restrain either despair or desire.

rubric_passages.Genitalia female: It is a most useful remedy in the female when there is marked irritability of the sexual organs, if the sexual desire is great excited; it is one of our best remedies for nymphomania.

profile.personality: A constitutionally weakened individual prone to deep-seated rheumatic and gouty conditions, with progressive physical deterioration. They are fundamentally rigid and contracted in nature, both physically (shortened tendons, stiff joints) and temperamentally (obstinate, indolent), reflecting a system that has become fixed and resistant to change.
profile.mental_state: Absent-minded particularly in the morning, with forgetfulness and a progressive weakness of mind accompanying the bodily decline. There is a mental sluggishness and indolence that mirrors the physical exhaustion, suggesting a mind that has become as stiff and unresponsive as the contracted limbs.
profile.emotional_pattern: Low-spirited and fretful, with an underlying obstinacy that resists both comfort and correction. The emotional state is one of irritable resignation — a person worn down by chronic suffering who becomes peevish and contrary, yet lacks the vitality to express stronger emotions.

profile.personality: A profoundly passive, withdrawn individual who appears semi-idiotic or dazed, sitting in silence and staring blankly into space. They are indifferent to external impressions — unmoved by heat, cold, touch, or social interaction — and seem unable to project ideas or exert willpower over their own body. Fixed ideas take root and cannot be dislodged by reasoning or argument.
profile.mental_state: The mind is benumbed and stupefied, with severely diminished concentration, memory, and the power of thought; the patient cannot rivet attention, cannot think clearly, and answers questions only after long delay or not at all. There is a characteristic loss of the mind's control over the body — muscles will not obey the will, creating a paralytic sluggishness rather than active delirium. When roused with effort, the patient stares with a dazed expression and may speak of seeing spirits or devils, but these hallucinations are shaped by prior learning rather than original ideation.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is deep apathy masquerading as melancholy — the patient appears sad and woeful but is largely incapable of active feeling or lamentation. Consolation aggravates the condition, yet there is no fear of death as in Aconite, nor the restless anguish of Aurum; instead there is a quiet, stubborn conviction of having sinned or committed an unpardonable wrong. A quasi-hysterical religious guilt may dominate, with fixed ideas about having sinned away one's day of grace, held with calm certainty rather than emotional torment.

rubric_passages.Back: These muscles keep shortening, as the disease progresses, just as they do in cerebro-spinal meningitis; until the head is drawn back as far as it can go.
rubric_passages.Bladder: The urine is retained or suppressed; sometimes it dribbles away passes unconsciously. Urine passed in a feeble stream; bloody urine.
rubric_passages.Chill: Rarely much disturbed by being touched, or by being covered too warmly, or by not being covered at all. He does not seem to be sensitive to heat, or cold, or pricking, or handling or pinching.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The patient lies on the back, with his limbs drawn up; or slides down in bed. Great debility; great relaxation; the muscles refuse to act.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The Helleborus patient is benumbed everywhere. The whole sensorium is in a benumbed state, a stupefaction, a blunting of general sensibility.
rubric_passages.Head: Burning heat in the head; shooting pains; pressive pains in the head from congestion. Violent occipital headache. Dull aching in the occiput; benumbed feeling in the occiput. A feeling like wood fullness, congestion and pressure.
rubric_passages.Mind: In all the complaints of Helleborus stupefaction occurs in greater or less degree. Sometimes it is a complete stupor, sometimes a partial stupor, but it is always stupefaction and sluggishness.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: Delirium is not common, and when present it is muttering. There is more stupefaction, more "do nothing," more "say nothing," than delirium.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The patient lies upon the back, eyes partly open, rolling the head, mouth open, tongue dry, eyes lusterless, staring into space.
rubric_passages.Rectum: In the early part of the proving there are diarrhoea and dysentery; with copious white gelatinous stool; stool consisting solely of pale tenacious mucus. And then comes paralytic constipation.
rubric_passages.Skin: It is not so much the awful pains, but it is the itching, tingling and formication that cause the appearance of extreme agony. Sometimes in every part of the child's body it is a week before all these symptoms go away of themselves but they will go away, if left alone.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The nausea and vomiting are nondescript.
rubric_passages.Appetite, increased (hunger in general): There is violent thirst in these fevers, and unusual canine hunger.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: There is violent thirst in these fevers, and unusual canine hunger.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: The urine is retained or suppressed; sometimes it dribbles away passes unconsciously. Urine passed in a feeble stream; bloody urine.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Burning heat in the head; shooting pains; pressive pains in the head from congestion.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Great debility; great relaxation; the muscles refuse to act.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: The headaches, the motions of the head and the appearance of the face are those occurring in congestion of the brain.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet: Listlessness. What is called in the text "stubborn silence" is more an apathetic silence, an inability to speak. It appears as if he refused to answer, but he does not; he does not know how to answer; he cannot think.
rubric_passages.Appetite: There is violent thirst in these fevers, and unusual canine hunger.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is a clinical observation which you will see if you see Hellebore cases, and Zincum cases. Zincum is, if possible, even more profound in its dreadful state of stupefaction than Hellebore.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: In the early part of the proving there are diarrhoea and dysentery; with copious white gelatinous stool; stool consisting solely of pale tenacious mucus.

profile.personality: The Hepar Sulphur constitutional type is an oversensitive, irritable individual who is described as 'delicate' and hypersensitive to all impressions — pain, cold, touch, and surroundings. They are quarrelsome, hard to get along with, and nothing pleases them; they desire constant change of persons, things, and surroundings, yet each new change again displeases and irritates them.
profile.mental_state: The mind is characterized by extreme irritability and violent, destructive impulses that can overwhelm the patient — sudden urges to stab a friend, a barber's impulse to cut a patron's throat, or a mother's impulse to throw her child into the fire. These impulses are without rational cause and may increase to the point of insanity, manifesting as mania, particularly pyromania. The patient is impulsive, abusive, and intensely angry at every little disturbance.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of hypersensitivity escalating into rage and destructive impulses. The patient faints from even slight pain, demonstrating an inability to tolerate suffering, while emotionally they cannot tolerate people or circumstances around them. There is a deep restless dissatisfaction — an endless cycle of seeking change and being displeased by what is found — combined with a hair-trigger temper that transforms minor annoyances into intense anger.

rubric_passages.Bladder: Catarrh of the bladder, with purulent discharges in the urine and copious muco-purulent deposits. Ulcers of the bladder. The walls of the bladder become hardened, so that it has almost no power to expel its contents, and the urine passes in a slow stream or in drops, or in the male the stream falls down perpendicularly. No ability to expel the urine with force. It is a paresis. There is burning in the bladder and frequent, almost constant, urging to urinate.
rubric_passages.Chest: a rattling, barking cough with great soreness of the chest in an oversensitive and chilly patient.
rubric_passages.Chill: The Hepar patient is chilly. He is sensitive to the cold and wants an unusual amount of clothing when in cold air. He wants the sleeping room very warm and can endure much heat in the room, many degrees warmer than a healthy person ordinarily desires, He has no endurance in the cold and all his complaints are made worse in the cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Felons around the root of the nail and ends of the fingers. The nail suppurates and loosens and comes off. Sensation of splinters under the nails, even when they do not suppurate. The nails become hard and brittle. Warts crack open and bleed, sting and burn and suppurate.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: The exposure of hand or foot at night in bed brings on symptoms. He wants the covers drawn close about the neck when in bed.
rubric_passages.Generalities: If he becomes cold in sleep his complaints come on or if he is out in the cold, dry wind, complaints come on; inflammatory and rheumatic complaints appear. The exposure of hand or foot at night in bed brings on symptoms.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: They become withered and shriveled, and have rheumatic affections about the joints.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Copious leucorrhoea with the same offensive, cheesy smell. The leucorrhea is so copious that she is compelled to wear a napkin, and the napkins, I have been told by women who have been cured by Hepar, are so offensive that they must be taken away and washed at once because the odor permeates the rooms.
rubric_passages.Head: They sweat much about the head, they ache in the bones, and every change of weather to cold, and every cold, damp spell affects them.
rubric_passages.Mind: This remedy belongs to patients that are called delicate, that are oversensitive to impressions. The mind takes part in this oversensitiveness and manifests itself by a state of extreme irritability.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Every little thing that disturbs the patient makes him intensely angry, abusive and impulsive. The patient is quarrelsome, hard to get along with; nothing pleases; everybody disturbs oversensitiveness to persons, to people and to places.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: He desires a constant change of persons and things and surroundings and each new surrounding or person or thing again displeases and makes him irritated.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The odor that comes from that mouth when it is opened to show the throat is extremely offensive; very often like spoiled cheese.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Dry, paroxysmal cough from evening until midnight and sometimes lasting all night, with choking, gagging and crouping; some loose coughing in the daytime; rawness and scraping the larynx; worse in cold air or uncovering hand or foot in bed.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: When the croup comes on after midnight and the child wakes up frightened, suffocating, rouses up in bed with a dry, hoarse and ringing cough, which rings like a dry whoop.
rubric_passages.Skin: Localized inflammations incline to suppurate, especially in glands and cellular tissue do we have suppuration and ulcers. Eruptions are sensitive, to touch. This accords with the oversensitiveness of the nerves found everywhere.
rubric_passages.Sleep: If he becomes cold in sleep his complaints come on. Putting the hand out of bed accidentally when sleeping will bring on cough, and cause sneezing.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The cough is attended with choking and gagging, even to vomiting.

profile.personality: A depleted, worn-down individual who has suffered prolonged physical illness, presenting as weak, emaciated, and cachetic. They are slow in all processes — digestion, recovery, and vitality — with a general torpidity that pervades their entire constitution.
profile.mental_state: Remarkably absent of strong mental symptoms, which is itself a distinguishing characteristic; the mind remains relatively intact while the body deteriorates. The only notable mental feature is a general discouragement and despondency arising from long-continued physical suffering and weakness, rather than any primary mental pathology.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by a deep weariness and resignation born of chronic illness, with a paradoxical combination of hunger and loathing — craving relief yet repelled by what might provide it. There is a quiet, uncomplaining endurance rather than acute emotional distress, with fainting and sinking sensations reflecting an emotional emptiness that mirrors the characteristic physical 'goneness' in the stomach.

rubric_passages.Generalities: Hydrastis is a slow, deep acting remedy, required in many trophic disturbances. where there is emaciation, catarrhal conditions and ulceration, even malignant ulceration. Defective assimilation.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Thick, yellow, viscid leucorrhoea, sometimes white, sometimes offensive. Excoriation of vagina. Soreness in vagina during coition. Bleeding after coition. Uterine haemorrhage. Menses copious. Relaxed, dragging feeling in pelvis. Intense itching of vulva. Epithelioma of mamma.
rubric_passages.Rectum: It has cured obstinate piles, ulceration and fissures of anus. Relaxation and prolapsus of anus. Chronic diarrhoea with yellow, thin faeces, even watery. Inflammation of anus. Stools, bileless, white, soft, acrid, greenish, much viscid mucus. Hard, nodular stools. Most obstinate constipation; no desire for stool for days.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Most obstinate constipation; no desire for stool for days.
rubric_passages.Stomach: No appetite; no thirst; loathing of food. Nearly all foods disorder the stomach. Spitting up the food by the mouthful (like Phos. and Ferr.). Vomits all food. Retains only water and milk. Eructations, sour, putrid, of food eaten.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Cramping pains. Colic, Flatulence and distended abdomen. Sharp pain in region of spleen.
rubric_passages.Clinical: This remedy has been very useful in the treatment of malignant ulcers. In such ulcers it is often a great comfort to the patient, even when it does not cure, as it removes the offensiveness, modifies the pain and restrains the destructiveness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: Uterine haemorrhage. Menses copious. Relaxed, dragging feeling in pelvis.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Cramping pains. Colic, Flatulence and distended abdomen. It has cured many of the usual conditions that generally attend bad digestion and torpid liver. Intestinal catarrh and ulceration. Sharp pain in region of spleen.
rubric_passages.Ear: Otorrhoea with thick, viscid, purulent discharge. Copious mucous discharge. Catarrh of the Eustachian tubes with many noises in ears. Ears red, swollen, covered with scales; fissured behind where connected with head.
rubric_passages.Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: Nearly all foods disorder the stomach. The stomach seems to be only an ordinary sack; digestion is slow, and tedious. Fullness after eating, lasting a long time. Chronic gastric catarrh. Slow digestion.
rubric_passages.Ear, discharges: Otorrhoea with thick, viscid, purulent discharge. Copious mucous discharge.
rubric_passages.Expectoration: Thick, yellow, viscid, sometimes white, expectoration in old people, or when very chronic.
rubric_passages.Expectoration, viscid: Thick, yellow, viscid, sometimes white, expectoration in old people, or when very chronic.
rubric_passages.Generalities, mucous secretions increase: Catarrhal symptoms with thick, viscid, ropy, yellow mucus, sometimes white, from any mucous membrane, with or without ulceration.
rubric_passages.Nose: The nose is obstructed with stringy, yellow or white mucus. The air feels cold in the nose, and the membrane is raw and ulcerated. Ropy mucus is drawn from posterior nares into the throat. Rawness in both nares with constant urging to blow the nose. Coryza with discharge, scanty in room and profuse in open air. Bloody, purulent discharge from nose. Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge. Large crusts constantly form in the nose.
rubric_passages.Clinical, ulcers: This remedy has been very useful in the treatment of malignant ulcers. In such ulcers it is often a great comfort to the patient, even when it does not cure, as it removes the offensiveness, modifies the pain and restrains the destructiveness. The burning so commonly found in such ulcers is a strong symptom of Hydrastis.
