rubric_passages.Expectoration, yellow: Thick, yellow, viscid, sometimes white, expectoration in old people, or when very chronic.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, leucorrhea: Thick, yellow, viscid leucorrhoea, sometimes white, sometimes offensive.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, leucorrhea, yellow: Thick, yellow, viscid leucorrhoea, sometimes white, sometimes offensive.
rubric_passages.Nose, discharge, thick: Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge.
rubric_passages.Nose, discharge, yellow: The nose is obstructed with stringy, yellow or white mucus. Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation, ineffectual urging: In old cases when enemas no longer act, when the faeces remain high up, or do not come down into rectum to excite desire, this remedy has been of great service.
rubric_passages.Stomach, emptiness, weak feeling, faintn: Empty, faint feeling in stomach with loathing of food and obstinate constipation with no desire for stool, is a combination that must generally have Hydrastis. The empty, sinking feeling is not ameliorated after eating.
rubric_passages.Nose, discharge: Coryza with discharge, scanty in room and profuse in open air. Bloody, purulent discharge from nose. Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge.
rubric_passages.Stomach, emptiness: Empty, faint feeling in stomach with loathing of food and obstinate constipation with no desire for stool, is a combination that must generally have Hydrastis. The empty, sinking feeling is not ameliorated after eating.

profile.personality: A deeply suspicious and restless individual prone to busy, prattling behavior and preoccupation with trivial or bizarre mental occupations. The Hyoscyamus type is characteristically passive rather than violent, tending toward muttering soliloquies, talking to imaginary persons, and carrying on habitual routines even in disordered states.
profile.mental_state: The mind alternates between delirium with vivid hallucinations and stuporous states from which the patient can barely be roused. There is a constant stream of illusions, imaginary conversations with absent or dead persons, and suspicion that others are plotting against them. The mental activity is busy yet purposeless, with the patient fixating obsessively on trivial details such as arranging patterns or picking at objects.
profile.emotional_pattern: Suspicion and fear dominate the emotional landscape, particularly fear of being poisoned, betrayed, or abandoned, arising from a deep sense that friends and family have turned against them. There is a pronounced tendency toward jealousy, lascivious excitement, and shameless exposure without awareness of impropriety. Religious despair may emerge, with the conviction of having committed unforgivable sins, alongside vulnerability to insanity triggered by disappointed love or emotional betrayal.

rubric_passages.Bladder: Paralysis of the bladder after labor, so that the urine remains in the bladder, with no desire to urinate.
rubric_passages.Chest: Spasms of the muscles of the chest.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Paralytic weakness of the limbs. Convulsions of the muscles. Twitching. Frequent twitchings of the muscles of the hands and feet.
rubric_passages.Generalities: All the muscles tremble and quiver, a constant state of erethism throughout the economy. A state of irritability and excitability.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Gradually increasing weakness, whether it be in a continued fever where there has been a delirium or excitement, or in a case of insanity with erethism, of the nerves and mind; excitability and gradually increasing weakness.
rubric_passages.Head: In the Hyoscyamus fevers there is so much brain trouble, and there is left behind a tendency to muscular weakness of the eyes, disturbances of the eyes, and congestion of the retina, and disturbances of vision.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental state is really the greatest part of Hyoscyamus. Talking, passive delirium, imaginations, illusions, hallucinations; talking, rousing up and talking with a delirious manifestation, and then stupor.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: A state of irritability and excitability.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: It goes as a passive medicine, while the upper ones are more active. Hyoscyamus has a passive mania. Does not go into violence.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: All the muscles tremble and quiver, a constant state of erethism throughout the economy. A state of irritability and excitability.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, night: Starts up in a fright. jerks in sleep, and cries out.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The mouth is very dry, as dry as burnt leather.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Very great dryness of the mouth, throat and nose, wherever the mucous membranes are.
rubric_passages.Sleep: The sleep is a great tribulation to this nervous patient. There are times of sleeplessness. Again, profound sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The stomach is distended. Great pain in the stomach. Dryness evidently in the stomach like there is in the mouth, because it occurs along with it. Burning and smarting in the stomach; and when there is no inflammation there is vomiting of blood.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: No desire of the bladder to expel the contents.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: Hyoscyamus has various crampings; cramps in the fingers and toes and of the muscles here and there, temporary paralysis, etc.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Complete prostration, so that the patient slides down in bed, until the jaw drops.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: Children, either in convulsions, or between convulsions, in congestion, also grind the teeth in the night, and in this comatose state.

profile.personality: Hypericum represents a highly sensitive, nerve-oriented constitution prone to feeling injuries and insults deeply, particularly in areas rich in sensory nerves. These individuals are reactive to trauma, with effects that extend far beyond the original site of injury, radiating outward along nerve pathways. They tend to linger in their suffering, with complaints that persist long after the initial cause has resolved.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by heightened nervous sensitivity and a tendency toward hysterical and anxious states, especially following physical trauma or injury to the spine and coccyx. There is a vulnerability to shock and concussion effects that cloud mental clarity, with symptoms shooting and darting unpredictably through the mind as pain does through the body.
profile.emotional_pattern: Emotionally, the Hypericum type exhibits a pattern of deep distress disproportionate to the apparent severity of the injury, with suffering that ascends and intensifies over time rather than resolving. There is a nervous, restless quality driven by sharp, shooting sensations that prevent calm or stillness. Long-standing emotional irritability and hysteria may develop from unresolved physical trauma, particularly spinal injuries sustained during labor or accidents.

rubric_passages.Back: Injuries of the spine give us another class of troubles requiring Hypericum.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Stitching, shooting pains in the back in various directions; they shoot down the limbs.
rubric_passages.Extremities: pains shooting up the spine and down the extremities, shooting pains over the body and often convulsive movements.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Its action is upon the nerve sheaths and meninges, with stitching, tearing, rending pains along the nerves, wherever there are injuries.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Many a woman sustains an injury of the coccyx during labor, and however, slight, soreness remains for years afterwards, and she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Many a woman sustains an injury of the coccyx during labor, and however, slight, soreness remains for years afterwards, and she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
rubric_passages.Head: went home, bad pains in the head and various pass of the body.
rubric_passages.Mind: she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: stitching, tearing, rending pains along the nerves, wherever there are injuries.
rubric_passages.Face: from this stage to advanced states of tetanus with opisthotonos and lock-jaw Hypericum is the remedy.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, sacral region: Injuries of the coccyx are among the most serious and troublesome injuries that the physician comes in contact with; injuries just like that, falling back and striking a stone, or something that bruises the coccyx.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: shooting pains extend up the arm with much violence.
rubric_passages.Face, lockjaw: from this stage to advanced states of tetanus with opisthotonos and lock-jaw Hypericum is the remedy. It is full of just such symptoms as are found in tetanus and such symptoms as lead to tetanus and it is full of all the manifestations of an ascending neuritis.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions: pains shooting up the spine and down the extremities, shooting pains over the body and often convulsive movements.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions, tetanic rigidity: from this stage to advanced states of tetanus with opisthotonos and lock-jaw Hypericum is the remedy. It is full of just such symptoms as are found in tetanus and such symptoms as lead to tetanus.
rubric_passages.Extremities, fingers: When the finger ends or toes have been bruised or lacerated, or a nail has been torn off, or when a nerve has become pinched between a hammer and the bone in a blow, and that nerve becomes inflamed and the pain can be traced up along the nerve.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, tearing: Meningeal troubles are common from injuries of that class, with drawing of the muscles of the back, a feeling of contraction or tightening. Stitching, shooting pains in the back in various directions.
rubric_passages.Clinical, injuries (including blows, fal: A sudden lurch of the car caused a man who was standing on the rear end of the car to be hurled back on his coccyx. He did not think much of it, went home, bad pains in the head and various pass of the body.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, tearing, externally: burning, stinging, tearing pains; no healing process. That wound needs Hypericum.
rubric_passages.Generalities, shocks from injury: for the first hours for bruised conditions and concussions and shocks Arnica is routine, because it produces states upon the human body like it had been bruised.
rubric_passages.Clinical, wounds: A wound will sometimes yawn, swell up, no tendency to heal, look dry and shiny on its edges, red; inflamed; burning, stinging, tearing pains; no healing process. That wound needs Hypericum.
rubric_passages.Clinical, wounds, splinters, from: a carpenter may stick his finger with a brass tack and he does not think much of it, but the next night shooting pains extend up the arm with much violence.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, after-pains: Many a woman sustains an injury of the coccyx during labor, and however, slight, soreness remains for years afterwards, and she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, sore: close examination reveals nothing more than soreness upon pressure. Such injuries, if taken early, can be cured by Hypericum. It feels lacerated, and sore, and aches and never passes over until the results of the injury right in the spot have been removed.

profile.personality: A sensitive, delicate, refined, and highly educated individual—typically women and children—with fine-fibred nervous constitutions who become overwrought from excessive mental, emotional, or artistic exertion. These are not natural hysterics but intelligent, well-meaning people whose nervous systems have been pushed beyond capacity by grief, disappointment, or intense application to study, music, and social demands.
profile.mental_state: The mind is in a constant hurry, confused, and unable to concentrate or classify thoughts that were once well-organized; memory fails, scholastic methods vanish, and vivid fancies resembling delirium arise without fever. There is a peculiar contrariness where reactions are the opposite of what would be expected—the unexpected and unaccountable dominate both physical symptoms and mental responses.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern revolves around grief, unrequited or misplaced affection, and emotional shock that tears the person to pieces despite their best efforts at self-control. They are tearful, apprehensive, prone to sobbing in solitude, and oscillate between taciturn brooding and loquacious excitement, with a persistent dread of trifles and a haunting sense of having neglected some duty.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: With all these mental states she has a feeling of emptiness in the stomach and abdomen. Emptiness and trembling.
rubric_passages.Back: Melancholy after disappointed love, with spinal symptoms.
rubric_passages.Chill: Thirst during chill, but none during the fever, if she has a feverish state. It is suitable in intermittent fever. Excitable, nervous children and women with intermittent fever.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Ignatia has quivering in the limbs. Nervous, tremulous excitement. Numbness of one or the other arm. Tingling and prickling in the arm.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: A loss of one arm with as perfect paralysis as if it had come from a cerebral haemorrhage. In a few hours this passes off, and the arm is as well as ever. That is a hysterical paralysis.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Weakness of the body coming on suddenly. The patient is better lying on the painful side. Instead of increasing the pain, it relieves the pain.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Hysterical debility and fainting fits. Fainting in a crowd.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Nervous affections and troubles of all sorts come on at the menstrual period. Others will come back fairly crippled with painful menstruation, ovarian pains, hysterical conditions, displacement; prolapsus of the vagina and of the rectum.
rubric_passages.Head: It is full of headaches, and they are all congestive, pressing headaches, or tearing headaches, or headaches as if a nail were sticking into the side of the head or temple; ameliorated from lying upon it. The headaches are all ameliorated by heat.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mind is always in a hurry, in a state of excitement. No one can do things rapidly enough. The memory is untrustworthy. The mind flies all to pieces. It is a sort of confusion. No longer able to classify the things that have been classically put into the mind.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Whenever she is crossed or contradicted. Sensitive disposition; hyperacute. Overwrought intense. Every noise disturbs her.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: She desires to be alone and to dwell on the inconsistencies that come into her life. Sits and sobs. At times she is taciturn.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Prolapsus of the vagina and of the rectum. Tearing, shooting pains upwards from the anus and vagina up into the body towards the umbilicus.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Tearing, shooting pains upwards from the anus and vagina up into the body towards the umbilicus. Headache ameliorated, by warmth and rest; worse when pressing at stool.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Any little disturbance, a mental disturbance, a fright, or distress, or a grievance, will bring a young, sensitive woman home and to her bed, and she will go on with a spasm of the larynx. It is a laryngismus stridulus that can be heard all over the house. Ignatia stops it at once.
rubric_passages.Sleep: She is excited, weeps, is sleepless; unable to control herself. Children are convulsed in sleep after punishment.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Those strange things that are ordinarily hard to digest ameliorate the nausea rather than increase it. While milk and toast, and delicate things, and warm things, such as are usually taken, disturb the stomach and increase the nausea. Cold food is craved, and cold food will be digested when warm food will be disturbing and create indigestion.
rubric_passages.Appetite, increased (hunger in general): With all these mental states she has a feeling of emptiness in the stomach and abdomen. Emptiness and trembling.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Thirst when you would not expect it. Thirst during chill, but none during the fever, if she has a feverish state.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: With all these mental states she has a feeling of emptiness in the stomach and abdomen. Emptiness and trembling.

profile.personality: A restless, driven individual who cannot remain still and must stay perpetually busy to ward off overwhelming anxiety and violent impulses. Despite mental and physical exhaustion, they compulsively continue working, moving, and eating, as idleness brings unbearable distress. They are warm-blooded, intolerant of heat, and prefer cool environments.
profile.mental_state: The mind is in a state of progressive weakness with marked forgetfulness—losing track of thoughts, leaving behind purchases, forgetting what they were about to say or do. There is a constant threat of mental breakdown, with the intellect deteriorating from overwork yet the patient feeling unable to stop, believing that rest would lead to madness. Impulses to violence arise without cause or provocation, representing a form of impulsive insanity that can coexist with otherwise normal functioning.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by a deep, pervasive anxiety felt simultaneously in mind and body, accompanied by a characteristic internal thrill that only motion can relieve. Melancholy and fearfulness intensify during hunger and stillness, while eating and movement provide temporary emotional relief. Sudden, causeless impulses toward destruction—self-harm, murder, tearing things apart—arise unbidden during quiet moments, creating a terrifying inner life that the patient manages through ceaseless activity.

profile.personality: A restless, irritable constitution prone to sudden, violent acute episodes that center around the digestive system. The patient is sensitive to environmental changes, particularly damp weather and cold, and tends toward hemorrhagic tendencies with an overall reactive, easily overwhelmed physical state.
profile.mental_state: Marked by acute distress and an inability to concentrate beyond immediate physical suffering; every pain and discomfort seems to funnel into an overwhelming sense of nausea that dominates the mental landscape. There is a restless tossing and turning akin to Arsenicum or Rhus, with prostration that comes in spells rather than continuously, and moments of near-fainting that bring sudden fear.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by an anxious, gasping quality — a disproportionate sense of sinking and faintness from relatively small provocations, as though vitality drains away with each symptom. The patient experiences overwhelming dread with each gush of blood or wave of nausea, accompanied by a pallor and syncope that suggest deep emotional vulnerability to physical distress.

rubric_passages.Back: The febrile conditions commence with pain in the back between the shoulders, extending down the back, as if it would break, with or without rigors, much fever, vomiting of bile and seldom any thirst.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: continuous gagging, sharp pain in the stomach, pain in the back, below the shoulder blades, as if it would break, vomiting of bile, continuous nausea and great prostration.
rubric_passages.Chest: Ipecac. is especially the infant's friend and is commonly indicated in the bronchitis of infancy. The usual bad cold that ends in chest trouble in infants is a bronchitis.
rubric_passages.Chill: The chill is violent, sometimes congestive in character and often a rigor. The whole frame shakes, and the teeth chatter.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Convulsions in whooping cough; frightful spasms, affecting the whole of the left side, followed by paralysis; clonic and tonic spasms of children and hysterical women.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Ipecac. has a wide sphere of action among acute sickness. Most of its acute complaints commence with nausea, vomiting.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Hence its value in uterine hemorrhages; bright, red blood with nausea; a little blood is attended with fainting or syncope, but the great overwhelming nausea runs through the complaints of this remedy.
rubric_passages.Head: a congestive fullness in the head, a crushed feeling in the head and back of the head; the whole head aches and is full of pain.
rubric_passages.Mind: Ipecac. is sometimes as restless as Arsenic., but the Ipecac. prostration comes by spells, whereas the Arsenic prostration is continuous. You will see Ipecac. patients tossing over the bed as much as they do when they need Rhus, turning and tossing, and moving the hands and feet, with restlessness.
rubric_passages.Mouth: the tongue is red and raw
rubric_passages.Rectum: inflammation of the lower portion of the bowel, the rectum and the colon. The tenesmus is awful, burning, and continuous urging with the passage of only a little mucus, and blood.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: The tenesmus is awful, burning, and continuous urging with the passage of only a little mucus, and blood. With this there is constant nausea; while straining at stool, the pain is so great that nausea comes on, and he vomits bile.
rubric_passages.Respiration: He has to sit up nights to breathe, and the attacks are common and frequent.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: The child coughs, gags and suffocates, and there is coarse rattling which can be heard throughout the room, and the trouble has come on pretty rapidly.
rubric_passages.Skin: In suppressed eruptions, the symptoms will very commonly point to Ipecac. When the eruption does not come out, or an eruption has been driven back by cold, sometimes acute manifestations of stomach and bowels follow and colds settle in the chest from suppressed eruptions.
rubric_passages.Stomach: There is a sense of fullness in the stomach, cutting pains in the stomach and below the stomach, going from left to right.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: cutting pains in the stomach and below the stomach, going from left to right. The patient is unable to stir or breathe until that pain passes off. It holds him transfixed in one position, coming like the stabbing of a knife in the region of the stomach, or above the navel, going from left to right, and is attended with prostration and nausea.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: cutting pains in the stomach and below the stomach, going from left to right. The cutting pain in colic goes from left to right. The patient is unable to stir or breathe until that pain passes off.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: pain in the back between the shoulders, extending down the back, as if it would break
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: All her power seems to go with a little gush of blood. Ipecac. will cure and end the menstrual flow normally.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Ipecac. cures inveterate cases of gastritis when even a drop of water will not stay down; everything put in the stomach is vomited, continuous gagging.

profile.personality: A chilly, sluggish constitutional type who craves routine and warmth, tending toward sedentary habits with a love of beer despite its ill effects. The patient is physically restless yet mentally dull, with few strongly developed mental characteristics noted in provings, suggesting a constitution more dominated by physical suffering than intellectual or social engagement.
profile.mental_state: Mental symptoms are notably underdeveloped, indicating a torpid, clouded mentality lacking sharpness or animation. There is a general dullness and weariness of mind that accompanies the profound physical prostration, with dimness of vision often heralding mental fog and headache. The periodicity of symptoms suggests a rigid, clock-like mental rhythm resistant to adaptation.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional life is characterized by a deep weariness and resignation, with moods that shift and wander much like the physical pains migrate from joint to joint. There is an underlying irritability from chronic discomfort and sensitivity to cold, damp conditions, coupled with a passive, uncomplaining endurance. The alternation between catarrhal and rheumatic states mirrors an emotional pattern of suppressed distress that manifests somatically rather than being expressed directly.

rubric_passages.Back: In all parts of the body there is chilliness, in the back, especially in the back of the neck. Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region. Sharp pains in the region of the kidneys. Dull ache in the back. Many of the symptoms in the back are of a rheumatic character and wander from place to place. The rheumatic pains are worse stooping, and, like other pains, worse from motion.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region. Sharp pains in the region of the kidneys. Dull ache in the back. Many of the symptoms in the back are of a rheumatic character and wander from place to place. The rheumatic pains are worse stooping, and, like other pains, worse from motion.
rubric_passages.Chest: Quite a characteristic pain in the chest is the pain from the sternum to the back, associated with catarrhal conditions and with cough. Cough is caused from tickling in the larynx and at the bifurcation; dry, frequent, hard cough; great soreness in the chest when coughing and breathing deep.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The limbs are stiff in the morning on rising and the pains wander about, especially in the joints. Rheumatic pains that wander about. Pains in the limbs are worse from cold and worse from motion. They are better from heat and better in rest. Periodical pains, coming at regular times. The bones feel sore to the touch or on deep pressure.
rubric_passages.Generalities: A marked feature of Kali. bichromicum is a feeling of great weakness and weariness. When the pain has passed off, if in the limbs, the limbs are felt very weary. Great prostration and cold sweat.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning is a very marked symptom of the remedy.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: She suffers from prolapsus in the summer time, during hot weather. It is a very useful remedy in the woman for subinvolution. In the menstrual flow there are often membranes that cause her to suffer. The menstrual flow is too soon, excoriates the parts, causes the labia to swell and itch. Like the catarrhal conditions of other mucous membranes, there is leucorrhoea that is yellow and ropy.
rubric_passages.Head: It has violent headaches and its headaches are mostly associated with catarrhal conditions. A Kali bichromicum patient always suffers more or less from catarrh of the nose, and if he is exposed to cold weather the catarrhal condition will turn to dryness; then will come on violent headache; also headaches during coryza.
rubric_passages.Mind: There are very few mental symptoms owing to the fact that the remedy has been proved only in crude form. It needs to be proved in potencies to bring out the mental symptoms.
rubric_passages.Mouth: There is great dryness of the mouth; ropy saliva and mucus ulcers anywhere in the mouth; aphthous patches; ulcers of the roof of the mouth; even when these are syphilitic it is a most useful remedy; deep punched out ulcers.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: There is great dryness of the mouth; ropy saliva and mucus ulcers anywhere in the mouth.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Prolapsus of the rectum. After dry hard stool there is burning in the rectum. Patient suffers from a sensation of a large plug in the rectum and there is great soreness in the anus. He suffers much from hemorrhoids which protrude after stool and are very painful.
rubric_passages.Respiration: He has much wheezing when breathing; tightness at the bifurcation of the trachea.
rubric_passages.Skin: Upon the skin we have pustules, boils, eczema, blisters, herpes, shingles, ulcers on the skin, tubercles, suppurating tubercles and eruptions that are syphilitic in character.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Food lies like a load in the stomach; digestion seems suspended; there is a pressure as of a load after eating and much foods eructations. Nausea comes on very suddenly, sometimes while eating, soon after eating; vomits all food and it is sour as if it had turned sour very rapidly; so that there is vomiting of sour, undigested food, bile, bitter mucus, blood, yellow mucus and ropy mucus.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: There is a pressure as of a load after eating and much foods eructations.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: There is pain in the abdomen before the stool much pain during the stool, cramping and tenesmus.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: It has wandering pains from place to place, and wandering rheumatism in from joint to joint. There are pains in all parts. Pains are sometimes very violent; sometimes shooting; sometimes stitching stinging; again aching. The pains appear rapidly and disappear suddenly.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: Burning is a very marked symptom of the remedy.
rubric_passages.Appetite: There is aversion to meat and strange to say, he craves beer, which makes him sick, brings on diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires: There is aversion to meat and strange to say, he craves beer, which makes him sick, brings on diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Syphilitic conditions have been cured in the most advanced stages. It is a most useful remedy in septic and zymotic fevers. It has cured nasal polypus. It has cured lupus of the nose.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region, back, left, right: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: The abdomen is very tympanitic, with tenderness. There are stitching, cutting pains. Sinking in the abdomen with nausea after eating, then comes vomiting, then comes diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region, back: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: There is a cold sensation in the chest which is generally felt in the region of the heart. There is a pressure in the chest after eating also near the heart or supposed to be about the heart and there is palpitation. It has cured and been a very useful remedy in hypertrophy of the heart with palpitation.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Quite a characteristic pain in the chest is the pain from the sternum to the back, associated with catarrhal conditions and with cough. Cough with stitching pain in the chest.
rubric_passages.Ear: There are yellow, viscid discharges from the ears, with stitching pains and pulsating in the ears. Chronic suppuration of the middle, ear with perforated tympanum; eczematous eruptions on the ears, itching of the whole external ear.

profile.personality: The Kali carbonicum patient is whimsical, irascible, and irritable to the highest degree, quarreling with family over trivial matters. They are oversensitive to everything in their environment — temperature, drafts, atmospheric changes, and the lightest unexpected touch — yet hard to study because they withhold symptoms and present in vague, contradictory ways.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by fear and restless imagination: fear of the future, fear of death, fear of ghosts, and catastrophic 'what if' thinking that intensifies when alone, especially upon waking between 2 and 5 AM. There is a persistent inability to find peace, with sleeplessness driven by horrible dreams and an anxious vigilance — checking for drafts, anticipating disaster, unable to settle.
profile.emotional_pattern: Anxiety is experienced somatically, felt as a physical sensation in the pit of the stomach rather than as a purely mental state — a slammed door or unexpected touch sends a shock to the epigastrium. The patient never wants to be alone yet is difficult company, combining deep dependency and fearfulness with extreme irritability and quarrelsomeness toward those closest to them.

rubric_passages.Back: At times you will go into the confinement room when the woman has pains in the back below the waist line. The pains in the uterus are very weak, they are not sufficiently expulsive to make progress in the labor, the kind of pain that makes the woman utter the cry, "My back, my back!" The pains extend down the buttocks and legs. Pain in the back as if the back would break.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: "The back aches so badly while she is walking that she feels as if she could lie down on the street," etc.. The pain seems to take the force and vigor all out of the patient.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Discharges from the bladder, purulent discharges of a thick, tenacious, copious mucus deposited in the urine. In keeping with this there is much burning; burning in the urethra, during and after micturition. "Urine flows slowly with soreness and burning."
rubric_passages.Chest: The chest is very often affected in just the same way as the nose. There is the dryness and dry barking, hacking cough in cold air, but a copious expectoration of mucus when it becomes warm, and that is the time he is most comfortable, for the expectoration seems to relieve him.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Dyspnea with violent, irregular palpitation of the heart, throbbing that shakes the whole frame, pulsation that can be felt to the ends of the fingers and toes. Violent pulsations; patient cannot lie on the left side; accompanied by stitching pain through the chest, and cough.
rubric_passages.Chill: His body is cold and requires much clothing to keep it warm, but in spite of the fact that he is cold he sweats copiously; copious, cold sweat upon the body. Sweats upon the slightest exertion, sweats where the pain is, sweat over the forehead; cold sweat on the forehead with headache.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The feet bloat and the fingers puff; the back of the hands pit upon pressure, the face looks puffy and waxy.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: There is great coldness with the pains, with the cutting in the abdomen; he wants heat, hot drinks, hot water bags. A chronic coldness is felt in the abdomen, cold externally and internally.
rubric_passages.Generalities: He is sensitive to every atmospheric change; he can never get the room at just exactly the right temperature; he is sensitive to every draft of air and to the circulation of air in the room. He cannot have the windows open, even in a distant part of the house. His complaints are worse in wet weather, and in cold weather.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: One of the evidences that the Kali carb. patient is of a weakly constitution and is on the road to a break-down is that all of his symptoms are aroused and brought into action after coition, after sexual excitement.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The female has a great friend in Kali carb. It is full of her complaints and has many symptoms likely to be found in a sick woman. It is useful in cases of uterine hemorrhages that have been incessant in pale, waxy, hemorrhagic women; incessant haemorrhage following an abortion.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: At times you will go into the confinement room when the woman has pains in the back below the waist line. The pains in the uterus are very weak, they are not sufficiently expulsive to make progress in the labor, the kind of pain that makes the woman utter the cry, "My back, my back!" The pains extend down the buttocks and legs.
rubric_passages.Head: Violent pains here and there in the head, as if the head would be crushed. Cutting and stabbing, in the head. Violent congestive headaches as if the head were full. Head hot on one side and cold on the other; forehead covered with cold sweat.
rubric_passages.Mind: The patient is whimsical, irascible, irritable to the very highest degree, quarrels with his family and with his bread and butter. He never wants to be alone, is full of fear and imaginations when alone, "fear of the future, fear of death, fear of ghosts."
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: The patient is whimsical, irascible, irritable to the very highest degree, quarrels with his family and with his bread and butter.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The mouth is full of little ulcers, little aphthous patches. The mucous membrane is pale and ulcerates daily. The tongue is white with offensive taste; coated gray, with sick headaches.
rubric_passages.Rectum: It has most persistent and enormous hemorrhoidal tumors that burn, that are extremely sensitive to touch, that bleed copiously, that are extremely painful, making it impossible for him to sleep. He is compelled to lie upon the back and hold the nates apart, because the pressure is very painful to the external piles.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: There is great aggravation from stool, which is hard and knotty and requires great straining to expel.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: The piles cannot be put back; there is great distension and swelling inside. Haemorrhoids that come out after stool and bleed copiously and are very painful; they must be pushed back, and long after going to bed they burn like fire.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Burning in the anus and rectum, described as if a hot poker were forced into that passage; burning as with fire. The hemorrhoids burn like coals of fire. The burning of Kali carb. is like that of Arsenicum.
rubric_passages.Respiration: In old asthmatic patients with weak pulse, with the same pulsations and palpitation and cannot lie down. The only position it seems that he can find any comfort in is leaning forward, with his elbows resting upon a chair. The attack is violent and continuous, especially worse from 3 to 5 A.M., and worse from lying in bed.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Weakness of the heart, cardiac dyspnea; the breath is short and the patient cannot walk or must move very slowly. With the suffocation and dyspnoea the breathing is so short that the patient cannot stop to take a drink or eat; the breathing is rapid, not deep, but weak.
rubric_passages.Skin: It cures conditions due to psora, or to the suppression of eruptions in childhood, or to the closing up of old ulcers and fistulous openings with a history of troubles ever since. All these wandering pains and the chilliness are again relieved by eruptions, by the outbreak of discharges, by haemorrhages, by ulcers that eat in deep and flow freely and fistulous openings.
rubric_passages.Sleep: If compelled to remain alone in the house he is wakeful, sleepless, or his sleep is full of horrible dreams. He is never at peace, is full of imaginations and fear.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: He wakes up at 3 o'clock in the morning with fear, fear of death, fear of the future, worries about everything and is kept awake for 2-3 hours and then goes to sleep and sleeps soundly.
rubric_passages.Stomach: After eating he feels as if he would burst, so bloated is he. Great flatulence; belches wind upwards and passes flatus downwards; offensive flatus.
rubric_passages.Stomach, distension: After eating he feels as if he would burst, so bloated is he. Great flatulence; belches wind upwards and passes flatus downwards; offensive flatus.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: The belching up is also attended with fluid eructations, sour fluids that set the teeth on edge; they excoriate, or cause smarting in the pharynx or mouth.

profile.personality: A restless, hot-blooded individual who cannot tolerate warmth or confinement and must be constantly in motion. They are harsh, irritable, and cruel in temperament, particularly toward family members, yet alternate unpredictably with episodes of sadness and weeping.
profile.mental_state: Mental and nervous exhaustion paradoxically occurs during rest, while sustained physical activity and open air restore clarity and energy. In warm, enclosed spaces the mind becomes foggy, weak, and apathetic, with a profound inability to motivate oneself to act.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is an alternation between harsh irritability with abusive cruelty and sudden collapses into tearful sadness. There is a pervasive anxiety and nervous restlessness that drives constant movement, with emotional refinement progressively eroded as the constitutional state deepens.

rubric_passages.Chest: Cough from constant irritation in the larynx. Dry, hacking cough, hoarse cough with copious greenish expectoration. Catarrhal phthisis with thick, copious, greenish expectoration. Pleuritic effusion. Fluttering of the heart. Palpitation on slight exertion or when walking. Rapid pulse.
rubric_passages.Extremities: It cures sciatica when the pain is sharp from the hip down, worse lying, sitting or standing and better walking.
rubric_passages.Generalities: He is worse in the warmth of the house, but as soon as he goes into the open air he feels better, and as soon as be begins to walk he feels still better and can walk long distances without fatigue; goes into the house again and becomes weak and tired and exhausted.
rubric_passages.Head: The head: manifests some peculiar things, such as we sometimes see in syphilis, which the remedy controls when the other symptoms agree.
rubric_passages.Mind: This remedy has a peculiar mental state. There is a very strong degree of irritability, cruelty, and harshness of temper. He is harsh with his family and with his children; abusive. It will take all the sense of refinement out of his mind and then he will become sad and tearful.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: There is a very strong degree of irritability, cruelty, and harshness of temper. He is harsh with his family and with his children; abusive.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Terrible pain at the root of the tongue at night.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Pain and rawness in the larynx, with hoarseness; awakens from constriction of the larynx. It is very useful in phthisis of the larynx. Cough from constant irritation in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: awakens from constriction of the larynx.
rubric_passages.Skin: You may go to the bedside of a patient who is suffering from what she calls "hives; you will find she is covered from head to foot with an eruption that forms great nodules; she is fairly burning up from head to foot. She cannot endure any covering; the heat of her body is intense, yet she has no rise of temperature. Rough nodular manifestations all over the skin; a condition that will go away in a few hours, but in a few days, weeks or months come back again.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Though he has an excessive thirst and will drink large quantities of water, if very cold it will make him sick. Cold milk, ice cream, ice water, cold drinks and cold food, cold things in the stomach < all the symptoms.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Kali iod. has all the flatulence and belching of Carbo veg. and Lycopodium.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: I would notice, after a day or two, chemosis coming into the eyes and the patient beginning to ache in his bones all over, while the rheumatism of the joints would disappear.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Not only in old gouty troubles, but in patients threatening phthisis, and in old malarial troubles this medicine will be of great service.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: The old subjects who have always been taking Calomel or Blue Mass for their bilious complaints will in time become subject to frequent coryzas, constipation, pains and aches, and disturbance of the liver, and disordered stomach, and must have another dose of Mercury.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: The glands all over the body become tumid, enlarged and hard.
rubric_passages.Ear: There is copious, thick, green expectoration, green discharges of muco-pus from the nose, from the eyes, from the ear, thick, greenish leucorrhoea, green discharge from ulcers.
rubric_passages.Face: With the coryza the frontal sinuses become involved, and there is great pain through the forehead; pain in the eyes, pains through the cheek-bones.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Bi-parietal head pains of nerve syphilis, old, long standing cases. Pains through the parietal bones, through the side of the head, as if crushed in a vise; awful crushing, pulsating, pressing, rending pains on both sides of the head.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations, empty: Kali iod. has all the flatulence and belching of Carbo veg. and Lycopodium.
rubric_passages.Throat: Deep ulcers in the throat, old syphilitic ulcers; perforating ulcers, eating away and destroying all the soft tissues, the uvula and the soft palate. Ulceration upon the tonsils; enlarged tonsils; very painful sore throat. Knots and knobs in the throat upon the mucous membranes.
rubric_passages.Chest, lungs: Catarrhal phthisis with thick, copious, greenish expectoration. Pleuritic effusion.
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones: It affects the glandular structures and the periosteum after the manner of syphilis.
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones, pain: the bones of the nose are very sensitive to touch and become necrosed. I would notice, after a day or two, chemosis coming into the eyes and the patient beginning to ache in his bones all over, while the rheumatism of the joints would disappear.

profile.personality: The oversensitive, nervous, and delicate individual who has been worn down by prolonged mental work, deep sorrow, and sexual excesses. They are fundamentally exhausted people who have depleted their vital reserves through intellectual overexertion, emotional suffering, or dissipation, leaving them physically anemic and mentally prostrated.
profile.mental_state: Marked by profound mental exhaustion with weak memory, inability to recall words, and confusion worse in morning and evening. The mind is dull and prostrated, with difficulty articulating thoughts, incoherent speech, and a tendency toward brain-fag from overwork. There is a deep-seated fear of crowds, death, disease, evil, and solitude, with a nervous excitability that is easily triggered by bad news or fright.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by deep sadness, irritability, and perverted affections — the patient may become cruel to loved ones, develop antipathy toward their spouse, or sink into melancholic states with brooding, indifference, and loathing of life. They oscillate between passionate outbursts where they can hardly articulate and states of complete emotional withdrawal, weeping, and hopelessness, often believing they have sinned beyond redemption. Homesickness, prolonged grief, and nervous hysteria are characteristic, with complaints arising directly from vexation, bad news, and sorrow.

rubric_passages.Back: The back feels cold. Eruptions on the back, pimples. Weight in lumbar region. The nape and back lame.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back during rest, ameliorated by motion, respiration aggravates, during menses. Pains in occiput and loins morning on waking, ameliorated lying on back, passing off after rising. Intense pain along spine.
rubric_passages.Chest: This remedy has been favorably mentioned in angina pectoris. Anxiety in the chest in the morning. Catarrh of the chest. Spasmodic constriction. Constriction of the heart.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Cold hands and feet. Feet cold and damp. Cramps in thighs, calves and soles. Heaviness of limbs, of lower limbs and feet. Numbness of the limbs, upper and lower; hands and finger tips, feet and legs.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Cold hands and feet. Feet cold and damp.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The over-sensitive, nervous, delicate person, worn out from long suffering, much sorrow and vexation, and prolonged mental work; also such as are broken down from sexual excesses and vices.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: The weakness, emaciation, and anaemia and tubercular tendency are strong features of this wonderful antipsoric remedy. All forms of nervous weakness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In tired out nervous women who are subject to abortion. Aversion to coition. Desire increased, intense for four or five days after menses. Inflammation of uterus. Itching from leucorrhoea.
rubric_passages.Head: The head is cold, and sensitive to cold air. Congestion; fullness of the head felt on coughing. Heat in head evening, flushes of heat in the forehead. The head inclines to fall forward.
rubric_passages.Mind: Flies into a passion and can hardly articulate. Aversion to answering questions. Apprehensive anxiety, in the evening in bed, and during the night; anxiety after eating, about the future, about his health, about his salvation.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The tongue is dark coated and bleeding. The gums bleed, and are covered with sores. The typhoid mouth, tongue and teeth in septic fevers when there are putrid odors.
rubric_passages.Skin: Burning after scratching. The skin is cold, jaundiced, dry. Eruption moist, and the moisture is bad smelling. Itching, crawling, stinging in the skin. Very sensitive skin.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: The pains are aching, pressing, stitching, tearing, tearing downwards, paralyzing. Chronic neuralgia, ameliorated by gentle motion, aggravated from cold.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Symptoms are often one-sided. One sided paralysis from a gradually increasing weakness.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Great lassitude. All forms of nervous weakness. The weakness, emaciation, and anaemia and tubercular tendency are strong features of this wonderful antipsoric remedy.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Too many cures have been made by the followers of Schiiessler to permit this remedy to remain unexplained. Good provings are found in our literature. The high and highest potencies have served the best, and it should be used in the single dose.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Pain in chest during cough, on inspiration, on motion, on breathing. Pain in lower part of chest on coughing, inside of chest, in heart. Aching in left side of chest through to scapula. Burning in chest. Stitching in chest on coughing, during respiration, in mammaze, sides of chest, in heart. Tearing pains in chest.
rubric_passages.Ear: Discharge from the ear, bloody, offensive, putrid, purulent. Eruptions on the ears. Pimples in the canal. Fullness in ears. The ears are hot.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: It has much pain in the head. Pain morning in bed, on rising, on waking, and passes off on moving about. Pain afternoon, evening and night. Worse in very cold air, but ameliorated in open fresh air.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness, mental depression: Sadness in morning on waking, in the evening, and also day and night. Insanity; melancholia; thinks she has sinned away her day of grace and refuses to eat.
rubric_passages.Stool: The stool is excoriating; bloody mucus or pure blood, brown, clay colored, watery stool; putrid flatus followed by tenesmus after breakfast. Stool copious, dark, frequent; large, light colored. Lienteric stools. Stools offensive, putrid, purulent, watery, like rice water, yellow or yellowish green mucus.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat: Fever in afternoon and evening. Heat all night, with hunger. Dry heat. Flushes of heat. Internal heat.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses: Menses absent, black, copious, dark, delayed, frequent, irregular, late, offensive, painful, pale, protracted, scanty, short, suppressed, thick. Uterine haemorrhage.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness: Sadness in morning on waking, in the evening, and also day and night. Obstinate; morose; mood changeable. Discontented and sad.
rubric_passages.Ear, discharges: Discharge from the ear, bloody, offensive, putrid, purulent.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Rheumatic and gouty pains in limbs and joints, ameliorated by motion and warmth. Pain in back and limbs, ameliorated by motion. Pain in shoulders and arms, in arms when raising them. Sciatica, ameliorated by gentle motion.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Erections very troublesome in the morning and during the night without sexual desire; violent in the morning. Impotency. Frequent seminal emissions with erections. Inflammation of glans penis. Sexual passion obliterated.

profile.personality: An irritable, obstinate individual who is easily angered and impatient. They are restless and always in a hurry as if excited, yet averse to work, business, and company. There is a changeable, hysterical quality with alternating moods and a deep sluggishness underlying the agitation.
profile.mental_state: Concentration is difficult with a dull, confused mind that worsens in warm rooms and improves in open air. The person is forgetful, misplaces words when writing, and cannot make up their mind. Mental exertion aggravates all complaints, and there is a persistent sense of thinking about something far away.
profile.emotional_pattern: Marked anxiety appears in the evening and at night, with fears of death, falling, and people, and being easily startled and frightened by trifles. The disposition is deeply discouraged, discontented, and low-spirited, alternating with periods of excitability and impetuous impatience. Oversensitivity to noise and a tendency toward weeping complete a picture of emotional instability with shifting states.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Sensation of emptiness in lower abdomen after stool ameliorated by displacing flatus.
rubric_passages.Back: Coldness in the back. Pain in the back on breathing, during menses, periodical, aggravated sitting, aggravated standing; ameliorated walking; aggravated in a warm room. Wandering pains. Pain in cervical region, dorsal region, between the shoulders. Pain in lumbar region during menses while sitting, and walking. Pain in sacrum. Aching, bruised, burning, drawing, stitching. Tension in the cervical region. Weakness in the lumbar region.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back on breathing, during menses, periodical, aggravated sitting, aggravated standing; ameliorated walking; aggravated in a warm room. Wandering pains.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region: Pain in cervical region, dorsal region, between the shoulders.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Chronic catarrh of bladder. The pain is pressing, sticking. It has urging to urinate aggravated at night, constant or frequent, ineffectual. Urination is painful, frequent at night, dribbling when walking.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Urination is painful, frequent at night, dribbling when walking.
rubric_passages.Chest: Anxiety in the chest, It is one of the most surprising remedies in catarrh of the chest. Rattling in chest from every cold change in the, Weather. Constriction of the chest. Oppression of chest and haemorrhage. Burning, cutting, stitching, and soreness in chest. Weak chest.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation with anxiety of heart. Tumultuous palpitation.
rubric_passages.Chill: Chill evening and night. Chilliness in the evening. Chilliness after exertion. Coldness of the skin. Quotidian chill. Shaking chill; evenings, 5 P.M., 6 P.M.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Coldness of upper limbs and hands. Cold Feet evening in bed, and during fever. Cracked hands. Cracking in joints. Heaviness of lower limbs. Jerking of the limbs. Numbness of hands, lower limbs and feet. Pain in the limbs during chill. Rheumatic pains in limbs. Restless legs. Stiffness of joints. Trembling of limbs, hands and feet. Weakness of joints, upper limbs, of knees.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Coldness of upper limbs and hands. Cold Feet evening in bed, and during fever.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: Coldness of upper limbs and hands.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Most symptoms are aggravated in the evening. The patient craves fresh and even cold air, and he is ameliorated in open air and cool air. Aggravation by exertion and becoming heated. Complaints come on during rest, and are ameliorated by motion. Complaints aggravated in warm room.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Sensation of emptiness and faintness in stomach.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: The pain are burning, cutting, jerking, stitching and tearing, ulcerative pains.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Heaviness of limbs and weariness of the body. Sluggishness of the body and lack of physical irritability.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: It builds up women who have been subject to abortion. Aversion to coition. Excoriation of the genitalia, with itching. Leucorrhea, burning, excoriating, greenish, yellow, purulent, thick or watery. Menses absent; bright red, copious, too soon, or too late, offensive, painful, protracted, scanty, suppressed.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Haemorrhage from the uterus, Pain in uterus, during menses. Bearing down in the pelvis, Burning in the genitalia. Labor like pains during menses.
rubric_passages.Head: Boiling sensation in the head, and coldness of vertex. Hyperemia in bed, on coughing, and in a warm room. Constriction like a band or close fitting-cap.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion, vertex: Boiling sensation in the head, and coldness of vertex. Hyperemia in bed, on coughing, and in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Mind: Quite unlike Pulsatilla, this patient is easily angered and obstinate and very irritable. Seems to be thinking of something far away. Anxiety in evening in bed, during the night and on waking. Aversion to work, to business and to company (like Puls.) Concentration of mind difficult, and want of self-confidence. Confusion in the evening and in the morning, in a warm room, ameliorated in open air. Dullness of mind, discouraged and discontented with everything.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Quite unlike Pulsatilla, this patient is easily angered and obstinate and very irritable. Very irritable in the morning on waking, in the evening and during menses.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Extremely excitable, and mental exertion aggravates. He is always in a hurry as if excited. Impatient and impetuous. Restlessness during menses.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, night: Anxiety in evening in bed, during the night and on waking. Fear at night of death, of falling, and of people.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Aphthae in mouth. Dryness of mouth and bleeding gums. Mucus in mouth and on the tongue. Sore burning tongue. Salivation. Taste insipid, putrid, sour, sweetish, wanting. Coated yellow slimy tongue, mostly at the base.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Dryness of mouth and bleeding gums.

profile.personality: A stoic, slow-moving individual who dreads exertion and shuns activity, finding clarity only in complete stillness. They are weary, exhausted, and profoundly sensitive to any disturbance — physical, environmental, or emotional — preferring to lie quietly on their back where their mind works with surprising lucidity.
profile.mental_state: Mental faculties and memory are perfect when recumbent and still, but the slightest motion brings vertigo, confusion, and incapacity for thought. There is a deep vulnerability to overstimulation — sunlight, movement, even turning the hand — that collapses cognitive function, and persistent motion leads progressively to nausea and vomiting.
profile.emotional_pattern: An anxious, apprehensive disposition dominated by the sense that something vital is threatened from within — particularly the heart. There is a quality of sudden, violent suffering borne with a strange passivity, alternating between intense distress and abrupt relief, as captured in the characteristic exclamation 'There, now it is gone!' followed by dread of the pain's inevitable return.

rubric_passages.Chest: Shooting pains through the heart, pains in the chest, intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation very marked when lying on the left side, > when lying on the back, sometimes > when sitting erect, < when bending forward.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Weariness of all the limbs; shuns all exertion.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The symptoms that indicate this remedy show themselves especially in the muscles, in the tendons, in the joints, along the course of the nerves, in rheumatic complaints.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness the only general symptom with neuralgia.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: He is perfectly exhausted and continuously tired.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is useful in rheumatic patients where syphilis is at the bottom, syphilitic rheumatism that has taken the course described until finally the heart has become affected and there is thickening of the valves.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: Fluttering of the heart, palpitation of the heart.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Either the arterial or venous system, or the valves of the heart, or both, may be affected. Dyspnoea from any kind of exercise, cardiac dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Shooting pains through the heart, pains in the chest, intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, pain: Wandering rheumatic pains in the region of the heart.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Pain will seem to take hold of a nerve and will hold on to it for many minutes, Coming with violence, coming suddenly and letting loose suddenly. Pains come in the extremities in the same way, taking hold as if the nerve were being pinched by nippers, or as if it were being torn to pieces.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, lower limbs: These pains sometimes shoot like lightning, again they tear along the nerves, along the sciatic and crural nerves, down through the calves.
rubric_passages.Eye: associated with kidney affections, we have many eye complaints, difficulties of vision, and these also especially call for this remedy.
rubric_passages.Eye, pain: For the pains in the eyes, the stitching, tearing pains that occur during kidney disturbance in pregnancy, or during albuminuria, Kalmia becomes a remedy.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, inflammation, heart: When articular rheumatism has been treated externally and cardiac symptoms ensue.
his syphilitic condition had to a great extent been suppressed, until finally the whole trouble had located in the heart. Kalmia removed all the dyspnea and palpitation in a few months.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: When articular rheumatism has been treated externally and cardiac symptoms ensue.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, pulse: intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, inflammation: The condition has increased until organic disease has come, even hypertrophy of the heart and valves.
rubric_passages.Chest, anxiety: Anxious expression of countenance associated with rheumatism of the heart.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, anxiety, heart, reg: Anxious expression of countenance associated with rheumatism of the heart.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, hypertrophy of hear: The condition has increased until organic disease has come, even hypertrophy of the heart and valves.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, pain, heart: Shooting pains through the heart, pains in the chest, intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, pain, heart, extend: the wandering pains go downwards, down the arms, down the back and down the legs; from the shoulder to the fingers, and from the hips to the toes.
